goal: Every displayed verse in Greek Esther and Greek Daniel must either exact-match its own translation source or be explicitly absent because that translation has no legitimate source witness.
rules: No Bible text mutation in this plan.
No overlay from DRB, NABRE, or KJV into active NRSV files.
No synthetic NRSV text from another translation.
No treating active NRSV text as its own source.

sourceStatus.KJV: historical Esther source present; mapping needed
sourceStatus.NRSV: external source candidate identified but not bound

estherGK.nextConcreteStep: Acquire or bind NRSV/NRSVA Greek Esther source before active text comparison.

sourceStatus.KJV: historical ordinary Daniel and addition sources present; mapping needed
sourceStatus.NRSV: ordinary Daniel internal baseline available; addition candidates identified but not bound

danielGK.nextConcreteStep: Run internal consistency comparison for ordinary Daniel 1-12 against canonical Daniel NRSV, then bind/extract addition sources.

nextWorkOrder: Greek Daniel internal consistency check for ordinary Daniel 1-12 against canonical Daniel NRSV.
Acquire or bind NRSV/NRSVA Greek Esther source witness.
Extract and normalize approved NRSV Daniel-addition sources.
Create exact source-collation reports only after source binding.
